calendar.matters:
MOTION Notice Of Hearing; Re; Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Compel Payment Of Judgment; Verified;
Off Calendar Apr-28-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert D. Links, Esq. of BERGER, NADEL 362-1940, for petitioner Law Offices of Cary S. Lapidus moving for writ of mandate to compel payment of judgment

COURT CALL APPEARANCES:
N. Thomas McCartney, Esq., 661-334-8011, for Respondent City of Wasco, opposing the motion

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court took PETITIONER LAW OFFICES OF CARY S. LAPIDUS' Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Compel Payment Of Judgment under submission. (DAG/301/CW) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780

MOTION Notice Of Hearing; Re; Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Compel Payment Of Judgment; Verified;
Off Calendar Apr-04-2003 Continued To Apr-25-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert D. Links, Esq. of BERGER, NADEL & VANNELLI 362-1940, for petitioner Law
Offices of Cary S. Lapidus moving for writ of mandate to compel payment of judgment
N. Thomas McCartney, Esq., 661/334-8016, for respondent and opposing party

RULING:
Upon request of counsel, the Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued
PETITIONER LAW OFFICES OF CARY S. LAPIDUS' Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Compel
Payment Of Judgment to April 25, 2003. Counsel to provide the Court with courtesy
copies with a cover letter referencing the continued hearing date. (DAG/301/JU)
Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780

MOTION For Order Determining Entitlement To Attorney'S Fees And For Order Fixinng The Same, And For Order Awarding Fees As Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-18-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CITY OF WASCO and WASCO PUBLIC FINANCING AUTHORITY Motions For Order Determining Entitlement To Attorney's Fees, And For Order Fixing The Same, And For Order Awarding Fees As Sanctions:
APPEAR: Robert D. Links, Esq. 362-1940 for petitioner & opposing party; N. Thomas McCartney, Esq. 661/334-8011 for defts & moving parties (appearing via CourtCall).
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES DENIED. NO LEGAL BASIS FOR WASCO TO RECOVER FEES. WASCO NOT PARTY TO AGREEMENT BETWEEN LAPIDUS & MCCARTNEY). Order signed in open court. (302/AJR/KS(EX)) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

MOTION For Order Determining Entitlement To Attorney'S Fees And For Order Fixinng The Same, And For Order Awarding Fees As Sanctions

APPEARANCES:
N. Thomas McCartney, Esq., 661/334-8011, for defendants City of Wasco and Wasco Public Financing Authority, moving party
Robert D. Links, Esq. of BERGER, NADEL & VANNELLI 362-1940, for plaintiff and opposing party

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Acknowledgement Of Partial Satisfaction Of Judgment; Declaration Of N. Thomas Mccartney
Off Calendar Aug-15-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
N. Thomas McCartney, Esq. 661/334-8011 for defendants CITY OF WASCO and WASCO PUBLIC FINANCING AUTHORITY moving party
Robert D. Links, Esq. of BERGER, NADEL & VANNELLI 362-1940 for Plaintiff and opposing party
* Both parties conceded to the Court's tenative ruling. Therefore, tentative adopted --defendant CITY OF WASCO's Motion to Compel Acknowledgement of Partial Satisfaction of Judgment: Granted - $85,000.00 to be credited from McCartney's settlement and and Richardson settlement in amounts owing to Lapidus under the arbitration award. (AJR/kh/301) Karen Farnsworth, CSR 5162
